programme.title: Murder In The 21st, Ep 9
programme.desc: Exploring some of this century's most notorious homicide investigations through a deep dive of each victim's digital footprint; social media posts, texts, emails and more are analyzed to uncover motive, means and opportunity.

programme.title: CI Asia: Top Terrorist
programme.desc: Police hunt for the mastermind of the 2009 Jakarta bombing, but are stunned to find the bombing's signature matches that of a long-dead terrorist.

programme.title: CI Asia: Top Terrorist
programme.desc: Polisi memburu seorang dalang pengeboman yang terjadi pada tahun 2009 di Jakarta, namun mereka tertegun saat mendapati bahwa ciri khas pengeboman tersebut cocok dengan seorang teroris yang telah lama tewas.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel, Ep 5
programme.desc: Many American motels have become places where transience and anonymity often go hand-in-hand. Murder at the Motel explores tragic murder cases set in motels and the pursuit to bring justice to the victims.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel, Ep 6
programme.desc: Many American motels have become places where transience and anonymity often go hand-in-hand. Murder at the Motel explores tragic murder cases set in motels and the pursuit to bring justice to the victims.

programme.title: First Blood S1, Ep 5
programme.desc: African-American women in the Mt Pleasant neighbourhood of Cleveland were vanishing. Their families cried for help, but no one knew what was happening. No one except Anthony Sowell.

programme.title: First Blood S1, Ep 5
programme.desc: Beberapa wanita Afrika-Amerika di perumahan Mt Pleasant di Cleveland menghilang. Keluarga mereka berusaha meminta bantuan, tetapi tidak ada seorang pun yang tahu apa yang terjadi kecuali Anthony Sowell.

programme.title: First Blood S1, Ep 6
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez terrorised Southern California in the mid-1980s, and anyone could be a target. Growing up yearning for a father figure, he found mentorship with his sadistic cousin.

programme.title: First Blood S1, Ep 6
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez meneror California Selatan pada pertengahan tahun 1980-an. Ia tumbuh tanpa adanya sosok ayah dan mendapatkan bimbingan dari sepupunya yang sadis.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw S3, Ep 4
programme.desc: Telling the stories of dramatic murders and other serious crimes through the interrogation of the accused, intercut with interviews with key players along with relevant news footage and archival material, including trial footage.

programme.desc: Forensic pathologists work with investigators to crack questionable cases.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died, Ep 6
Accused: Guilty Or... S3, Ep 15
programme.desc: An intimate account of what happens when someone is formally charged with a crime and sent to trial as told by the perspective of the accused, their legal team and their family members.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st, Ep 9
programme.desc: Exploring some of this century's most notorious homicide investigations through a deep dive of each victim's digital footprint; social media posts, texts, emails and more are analyzed to uncover motive, means and opportunity.

programme.title: Drug Runner Lover
programme.desc: In Indonesia's war on drugs, Police Superintendent Gembong Yudha tracks down Morris, the Nigerian kingpin who smuggles drugs into the country. A shipment of drugs from China gives the authorities the first clue about the drug syndicate.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw S2, Ep 3
programme.desc: When a 70-year-old grandmother passes away suspiciously on a road trip, investigators uncover a sinister murder plot while searching for her remains.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw S2, Ep 3
programme.desc: Ketika seorang nenek berusia 70 tahun meninggal dengan curiga dalam perjalanan darat, para penyelidik mengungkap plot pembunuhan yang menyeramkan saat mencari jenazahnya.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw S2, Ep 4
programme.desc: After a man and a woman are found shot on the side of the highway, investigators struggle to find clues to catch the killer until a deputy locates the victim’s missing car filled with guns, silencers, and a mysterious man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw S2, Ep 4
programme.desc: Setelah seorang pria dan seorang wanita ditemukan tertembak di pinggir jalan raya, para penyelidik berjuang untuk menemukan petunjuk untuk menangkap si pembunuh sampai seorang deputi menemukan mobil korban yang hilang berisi senjata, peredam suara, dan seorang pria misterius di belakang kemudi.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines, Ep 6
programme.desc: The series focuses on a variety of situations of crime-torn families, abduction survival tales, poisonous love triangles, brainwashing cases, battles to safeguard vulnerable children, and parental crimes.

programme.desc: Troubled teen Alyssa Bustamante was a self-styled 'bad girl' who said she wanted to know how it felt to kill. She gave in to this curiosity and murdered her nine-year-old neighbour Elizabeth Olten.

programme.title: Evil Up Close S6, Ep 8
programme.desc: Alyssa Bustamante adalah 'gadis nakal' yang mengatakan ingin tahu bagaimana rasanya membunuh. Ia melampiaskan rasa ingin tahunya dan membunuh tetangganya, Elizabeth Olten, yang berusia sembilan tahun.

programme.title: Court Cam S6, Ep 153
programme.desc: A lawyer runs into trouble before he steps into the courtroom, a husband is brought to justice for the murder of his estranged wife, an attempted courtroom escape ends in physical confrontation, and more.

programme.title: Court Cam S6, Ep 153
programme.desc: Seorang pengacara mengalami masalah sebelum ia melangkah ke ruang sidang, seorang suami diadili atas pembunuhan mantan istrinya, percobaan pelarian di ruang sidang berakhir dengan perkelahian, dan masih banyak lagi.

programme.title: Court Cam S6, Ep 154
programme.desc: A lawyer runs into trouble before he steps into the courtroom, a husband is brought to justice for the murder of his estranged wife, an attempted courtroom escape ends in physical confrontation, and more.

programme.title: After The First 48 S15, Ep 110
programme.desc: Detectives in Tulsa have only one witness to a domestic dispute that's escalated to a double homicide, a 12-year-old girl. Their case hangs on this question: will she or won't she be able to testify?

programme.title: After The First 48 S15, Ep 110
programme.desc: Para detektif di Tulsa hanya memiliki satu saksi atas kekerasan rumah tangga yang berujung pada pembunuhan ganda, yaitu anak berusia 12 tahun. Kasus mereka bergantung pada kesaksian anak tersebut.

programme.title: After The First 48 S16, Ep 118
programme.desc: Detectives in major cities around the country race against the clock in the wake of homicides, knowing that if they don't find a lead within the first 48 hours, their chances of solving a case are cut in half. The series shows how detectives use forensic evidence and witness interviews to help identify suspects.

programme.title: The First 48 S26, Ep 547
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a late-night meeting spins out of control, leaving a young father dead, his friend critically injured, and their SUV crashed through a child's bedroom.

programme.title: The First 48 S26, Ep 547
programme.desc: Di Tulsa, pertemuan larut malam menjadi tidak terkendali, menyebabkan seorang ayah muda tewas, temannya terluka parah, dan SUV mereka menabrak kamar tidur seorang anak.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?, Ep 9
programme.desc: First person accounts from the accused themselves, law enforcement and witnesses take viewers into the crime itself, walking through every step of the proceedings, to answer the question: did I do it?

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?, Ep 9
programme.desc: Kisah orang pertama dari terdakwa sendiri, penegak hukum, dan para saksi membawa pemirsa ke dalam kejahatan itu sendiri, menelusuri setiap langkah prosesnya, untuk menjawab pertanyaan: apakah saya yang melakukannya?

programme.title: DENS Play
programme.desc: DENS Play is the first local TV channel in Indonesia that is dedicated for games and e-Sports. Watch 24/7 exciting contents, including live e-Sports tournaments, pro player’s tips, and many more.

programme.title: DENS Play
programme.desc: DENS Play merupakan saluran TV lokal pertama di Indonesia yang didedikasikan untuk gaming dan e-Sports. Saksikan konten menarik 24/7, termasuk turnamen e-Sports yang disiaran Live, walkthrough untuk game-game terkini, tips dari para pemain pro, dan masih banyak lagi.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: No good deed is too small for this kind kid squad. Niah, Ari, Ellie and Jax go undercover to help others and squash their town's problems in secret.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Tidak ada perbuatan baik yang terlalu kecil untuk pasukan anak baik hati ini. Niah, Ari, Ellie, dan Jax menyamar untuk membantu orang lain dan mengatasi masalah kota mereka secara diam-diam.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: From finding lost items to cleaning up messes, three fairies in training love looking after kids in their care as they work toward earning their wings.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Dari menemukan barang yang hilang hingga membereskan kekacauan, tiga peri dalam pelatihan senang menjaga anak-anak yang mereka asuh sambil berupaya mendapatkan sayap.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Noddy turns detective. Accompanied by his dog Bumpy and car Revs, Noddy travels to the four corners of Toyland to investigate mysteries. Big Ears and Clockwork Mouse appear alongside new toys Deltoid, Smartysaurus and Pat-Pat the Panda.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Noddy berubah menjadi detektif. Ditemani anjingnya Bumpy dan mobil Revs, Noddy melakukan perjalanan ke empat penjuru Toyland untuk menyelidiki misteri. Telinga Besar dan Tikus Jarum Jam muncul bersama mainan baru Deltoid, Smartysaurus, dan Pat-Pat si Panda.

programme.desc: In a small Western town a young girl from the city forms a tight bond with wild horse Spirit while having adventures with her friends.

programme.desc: Di kota kecil di Barat, seorang gadis muda dari kota membentuk ikatan erat dengan Roh kuda liar saat bertualang bersama teman-temannya.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep, Grug, Thunk, Ugga, Sandy and Gran are back. Follow them as they meet new friends, outrun new creatures and encounter "firsts" the world has never seen - such as school, slumber parties, hiccups and elections.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep, Grug, Thunk, Ugga, Sandy dan Gran kembali. Ikuti mereka saat mereka bertemu teman baru, berlari lebih cepat dari makhluk baru, dan menghadapi hal "pertama" yang belum pernah dilihat dunia - seperti sekolah, pesta tidur, cegukan, dan pemilu.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Noddy turns detective. Accompanied by his dog Bumpy and car Revs, Noddy travels to the four corners of Toyland to investigate mysteries. Big Ears and Clockwork Mouse appear alongside new toys Deltoid, Smartysaurus and Pat-Pat the Panda.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Noddy berubah menjadi detektif. Ditemani anjingnya Bumpy dan mobil Revs, Noddy melakukan perjalanan ke empat penjuru Toyland untuk menyelidiki misteri. Telinga Besar dan Tikus Jarum Jam muncul bersama mainan baru Deltoid, Smartysaurus, dan Pat-Pat si Panda.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW offers regularly updated articles on its news website and runs its own center for international media development, DW Akademie. The broadcaster's stated goals are to produce reliable news coverage, provide access to the German language, and promote understanding between peoples.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW menawarkan artikel yang diperbarui secara berkala di situs beritanya dan menjalankan pusat pengembangan media internasionalnya sendiri, DW Akademie. Tujuan lembaga penyiaran tersebut adalah untuk menghasilkan liputan berita yang andal, menyediakan akses ke bahasa Jerman, dan meningkatkan pemahaman antar masyarakat.

programme.title: The Day: News In Review
programme.desc: The Day is a news show that helps you understand emerging stories from Europe, the US and across the globe. Join Brent Goff and Nicole Frölich from Monday through Friday as they put the day’s events into context with the help of experts, political players and DW’s reporters on the ground.

programme.title: The Day: News In Review
programme.desc: The Day adalah acara berita yang membantu Anda memahami berita baru dari Eropa, Amerika, dan seluruh dunia. Bergabunglah bersama Brent Goff dan Nicole Frölich dari Senin hingga Jumat saat mereka memasukkan kejadian hari itu ke dalam konteksnya dengan bantuan para ahli, pemain politik, dan reporter DW di lapangan.

programme.title: To The Point: Int'l Debate
programme.desc: Strong opinions, clear points of view, international agendas. Three journalists join our presenter and go straight to the point on an international issue that’s making news. It’s controversy and confrontation. It’s background and analysis. It’s the issues that are moving our world

programme.title: DW News

programme.title: DocFilm
programme.desc: Twins Husai and Hassi take the decision together to leave Sierra Leone. In spite of Husai’s initial failed attempt, this time they’re both ready to take the step. They hope to earn enough money and eventually bring over their parents and Husai’s daughter.

programme.title: DocFilm
programme.desc: Si kembar Husai dan Hassi mengambil keputusan bersama untuk meninggalkan Sierra Leone. Meski upaya awal Husai gagal, kali ini mereka berdua siap mengambil langkah. Mereka berharap mendapat cukup uang dan pada akhirnya bisa membawa serta orang tua dan putri Husai.

programme.title: REV: Auto & Mobility Show
programme.desc: Norway sells more EVs per capita than any other country. How did they do it? E-mobility in India aims to cut emissions and save people money. And REV looks into some claims about EVs. Are they true or false?

programme.desc: Norwegia menjual lebih banyak kendaraan listrik per kapita dibandingkan negara lain. Bagaimana mereka melakukannya? programme.title: REV: Auto & Mobility Show

programme.title: REV: Auto & Mobility Show
programme.desc: Norwegia menjual lebih banyak kendaraan listrik per kapita dibandingkan negara lain. Bagaimana mereka melakukannya? Mobilitas elektronik di India bertujuan untuk mengurangi emisi dan menghemat uang masyarakat. Dan REV menyelidiki beberapa klaim tentang EV. Apakah itu benar atau salah?

programme.title: HER: Women In Asia
programme.desc: Economic insecurity is part of a cycle of disadvantages for women, often caused by discrimination in employment and education. Women often don't control key assets such as the family home, property, or the right to make financial decisions, further limiting their chances to break the poverty cycle. HER meets three women striving to change that.

programme.title: HER: Women In Asia
programme.desc: Ketidakamanan ekonomi merupakan bagian dari siklus kerugian bagi perempuan, yang seringkali disebabkan oleh diskriminasi dalam pekerjaan dan pendidikan. Perempuan seringkali tidak mengontrol aset-aset penting seperti rumah keluarga, properti, atau hak untuk membuat keputusan keuangan, sehingga semakin membatasi peluang mereka untuk memutus siklus kemiskinan. DIA bertemu dengan tiga wanita yang berusaha mengubah hal itu.

programme.title: Shift: Living In Digital Age
programme.desc: The program focuses on a single topic – in depth and in detail. We talk to experts, present the key facts and explain complicated subjects in a simple manner. SHIFT – substantial, never superficial.

programme.title: Shift: Living In Digital Age
programme.desc: Program ini berfokus pada satu topik – secara mendalam dan rinci. Kami berbicara dengan para ahli, menyajikan fakta-fakta penting dan menjelaskan subjek rumit dengan cara yang sederhana. SHIFT – substansial, tidak pernah dangkal.

programme.title: Cinta Pada Gigitan Pertama
programme.desc: tells the story of a culinary academy graduate named Delima (Nadya Arina) who now lives in Bandung. He was forced by abah Rendy, his stepfather, to sell the banana plantation left by his biological father for the cost of ambunya Del's treatment.

programme.title: Cinta Pada Gigitan Pertama
programme.desc: mengisahkan tentang jebolan akademi kuliner bernama Delima (Nadya Arina) yang kini tinggal di Bandung. Ia dipaksa abah Rendy, abah tirinya, untuk menjual kebun pisang peninggalan abah kandungnya untuk biaya pengobatan ambunya Del.

programme.title: Ngebor Rezeki
programme.desc: Program acara "Ngebor Rezeki" ditayangkan di MNCTV dan dipandu oleh Inul Daratista serta suaminya, Adam Suseno. Acara ini menggabungkan unsur hiburan, musik dangdut, dan kegiatan sosial dengan membagikan rezeki kepada masyarakat yang membutuhkan melalui berbagai segmen interaktif dan tantangan menarik.

programme.title: BaPeran: Banyak Permainan
programme.desc: It's fun, but it doesn't make sense! Hosted by Denny Cagur, RCTI's latest Gameshow is ready to entertain viewers at home with a variety of unique games that each team must play in order to take home prizes.

programme.title: BaPeran: Banyak Permainan
programme.desc: Baper-baperan tapi gak bawa perasaan! Dipandu Denny Cagur, Gameshow terbaru dari RCTI siap menghibur pemirsa di rumah dengan berbagai macam permainan unik yang harus dimainkan masing-masing tim agar dapat membawa pulang hadiah.

programme.title: Mega Fights S1, Ep 35
programme.desc: Mega Fights adalah sajian eksplosif yang membedah pertarungan-pertarungan terbesar dalam sejarah olahraga tarung dunia.

programme.title: American Ninja... S7, Ep 8
programme.desc: American Ninja – Season 7 Episode 8 features athletes tackling a demanding obstacle course designed to test strength, agility, balance, and endurance. Returning competitors bring valuable experience while newcomers attempt to surprise the field with speed and determination. Dramatic moments unfold as athletes push their limits to secure a place in the next round of the competition.

programme.title: American Ninja... S7, Ep 8
programme.desc: American Ninja – Season 7 Episode 8 menampilkan para atlet yang menghadapi lintasan rintangan menantang yang menguji kekuatan, kelincahan, keseimbangan, dan daya tahan. Peserta berpengalaman kembali dengan strategi matang, sementara pendatang baru mencoba membuat kejutan dengan kecepatan dan semangat mereka. Momen dramatis terjadi saat para atlet berusaha melampaui batas kemampuan untuk melaju ke babak berikutnya.

programme.title: Knockouts!: Mosley Vs Mayorga
programme.desc: Knockouts!: Mosley vs Mayorga adalah tayangan sorotan atau highlight dari pertarungan tinju legendaris antara Shane Mosley dan Ricardo Mayorga.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo S23, Ep 3
programme.desc: FS Grand Sumo Season 23 – Episode 3 features crucial bouts as top contenders attempt to maintain winning records while challengers try to upset the favorites. Strength, balance, and quick tactical moves determine victory in the dohyo. With the tournament progressing, each match becomes increasingly significant for wrestlers aiming to secure a championship run.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo S23, Ep 3
programme.desc: FS Grand Sumo Season 23 – Episode 3 menampilkan pertandingan penting saat para kandidat juara berusaha mempertahankan kemenangan, sementara penantang mencoba menjegal unggulan. Kekuatan, keseimbangan, dan strategi cepat menjadi penentu kemenangan di dohyo. Seiring berjalannya turnamen, setiap pertandingan menjadi semakin krusial bagi pegulat yang membidik gelar juara.

programme.title: Macho: Hector Camacho, Ep 1
programme.desc: Dokumenter ini menyajikan kisah mendalam tentang kebangkitan, kejatuhan, dan kematian tragis Camacho.

programme.desc: Merupakan laga tinju kelas menengah ringan (light middleweight).

programme.desc: Menampilkan pertarungan antara Garcia Vs Morales.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo S23, Ep 4
programme.desc: FS Grand Sumo Season 23 – Episode 4 continues the prestigious tournament as rikishi compete fiercely to climb the rankings. Veteran wrestlers rely on experience and balance while younger competitors attempt explosive charges and rapid pushing techniques. Each bout in the dohyo becomes critical as contenders pursue momentum toward the championship.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo S23, Ep 4
programme.desc: FS Grand Sumo Season 23 – Episode 4 melanjutkan turnamen bergengsi saat para rikishi bersaing keras untuk naik di klasemen. Pegulat senior mengandalkan pengalaman dan keseimbangan, sementara pegulat muda mencoba serangan cepat dan dorongan kuat. Setiap pertandingan di dohyo menjadi sangat penting bagi para kandidat juara yang mengejar momentum kemenangan.

programme.title: Macho: Hector Camacho, Ep 2
programme.desc: Film dokumenter yang mengisahkan perjalanan hidup dan karier Hector Macho Camacho.

programme.title: TNF: Camacho Vs Foster
programme.desc: Dalam pertarungan ini, Camacho menunjukkan kecepatan dan kelincahan khasnya, sementara Foster berusaha memberikan perlawanan sengit.

programme.title: FS MMA: Prangley Vs Uscola
programme.desc: FS MMA: Prangley vs Uscola showcases a compelling clash between experienced fighter Trevor Prangley and versatile competitor Travis Uscola. Prangley is known for his powerful striking and grappling control, while Uscola brings agility and technical adaptability inside the cage. The match highlights a strategic contest where strength, endurance, and submission skills could determine the outcome.

programme.title: FS MMA: Prangley Vs Uscola
programme.desc: FS MMA: Prangley vs Uscola menampilkan duel menarik antara petarung berpengalaman Trevor Prangley dan petarung serba bisa Travis Uscola. Prangley dikenal dengan pukulan kuat dan kontrol grappling, sementara Uscola mengandalkan kelincahan serta kemampuan teknik yang fleksibel di dalam arena. Pertandingan ini menyoroti pertarungan strategi yang menguji kekuatan, ketahanan, dan teknik kuncian.

programme.title: Fight Quest S1, Ep 9
programme.desc: Episode 9: Netanya, Israel - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Krav Maga with Masters Ran Nakash and Avivit Oftek Cohen.

programme.title: Fight Quest S1, Ep 9
programme.desc: Episode 9: Netanya, Israel - Pembawa acara Jimmy Smith dan Doug Anderson mempelajari disiplin pertarungan Krav Maga bersama Master Ran Nakash dan Avivit Oftek Cohen.

programme.title: Knockouts!: Golovkin Vs Proksa
programme.desc: Pertarungan antara Golovkin menghadapi Proksa.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo S23, Ep 5
programme.desc: FS Grand Sumo Season 23 – Episode 5 presents more decisive bouts as leading rikishi attempt to maintain their winning records. Heavyweight wrestlers rely on raw strength and ring control, while agile fighters attempt quick sidesteps and throws. The episode highlights the physical intensity and tactical awareness required to succeed in professional sumo.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo S23, Ep 5
programme.desc: FS Grand Sumo Season 23 – Episode 5 menampilkan pertandingan penting saat para rikishi unggulan berusaha mempertahankan catatan kemenangan mereka. Pegulat bertubuh besar mengandalkan kekuatan dan kontrol ring, sementara pegulat yang lebih lincah mencoba gerakan menghindar dan teknik lemparan. Episode ini menampilkan intensitas fisik serta strategi yang dibutuhkan untuk sukses di sumo profesional.

programme.title: Macho: Hector Camacho, Ep 3
programme.desc: Film ini mengisahkan perjalanan hidup dan karier Hector "Macho" Camacho, seorang petinju profesional asal Puerto Rico yang dikenal dengan gaya bertarung flamboyan dan kepribadiannya yang mencolok.
